offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inaccurate asset depreciation calculations cause tax inefficiencies. We provide a fixed asset depreciation calculator instead of manual calculations using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate asset depreciation calculations lead to tax inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users manually enter asset details for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
